allow: Bash(python -c "import pandas as pd, glob; f=sorted\(glob.glob\('data/*_pitches.parquet'\)\)[0]; df=pd.read_parquet\(f\); print\(f\); print\([c for c in df.columns if c in \('zone','p_throws','stand','pitch_type','description','pitch_number'\)]\); print\(df['zone'].head\(10\).tolist\(\)\); print\('p_throws:', df['p_throws'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)\); print\('stand:', df['stand'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)\); print\('pitch_type top:', df['pitch_type'].value_counts\(\).head\(10\).to_dict\(\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('reports/first_pitch_offspeed/analyze.py'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('reports/first_pitch_offspeed/page.py'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK: both files parse'\)")
